transitions: border-color 0.3s cubic-bezier(0.39, 0.18, 0.17, 0.99), background 0.3s cubic-bezier(0.39, 0.18, 0.17, 0.99), color 0.3s cubic-bezier(0.39, 0.18, 0.17, 0.99), transform 0.3s cubic-bezier(0.39, 0.18, 0.17, 0.99), box-shadow 0.3s cubic-bezier(0.39, 0.18, 0.17, 0.99), width 0.4s cubic-bezier(0.39, 0.18, 0.17, 0.99)

rules.cssText: .grid-module__4pDFEa__systemDebugOverlay::before { content: "xs"; animation: 2s ease-out 0s 1 normal forwards running grid-module__4pDFEa__xsDisappear; }
.grid-module__4pDFEa__systemDebugOverlay::before { content: "sm"; animation: 2s ease-out 0s 1 normal forwards running grid-module__4pDFEa__smDisappear; }
.grid-module__4pDFEa__systemDebugOverlay::before { content: "smd"; animation: 2s ease-out 0s 1 normal forwards running grid-module__4pDFEa__mdDisappear; }
.grid-module__4pDFEa__systemDebugOverlay::before { content: "md"; animation: 2s ease-out 0s 1 normal forwards running grid-module__4pDFEa__mdDisappear; }
.grid-module__4pDFEa__systemDebugOverlay::before { content: "lg"; animation: 2s ease-out 0s 1 normal forwards running grid-module__4pDFEa__lgDisappear; }
.page-module__v4LXQW__logo { place-content: center; width: 100%; height: 64px; margin-bottom: 16px; display: grid; }
.campaign-customer-insights-module__SyawkG__insight:not(:last-child) { border-top: 0px; border-bottom: 0px; border-left: 0px; border-image: initial; border-right: 1px solid var(--guide-color); }
.article-module__9eLiuW__leadIn p { letter-spacing: -0.36px; padding-top: 8px; padding-bottom: 16px; font-size: 18px; line-height: 28px; }
.explore-cards-module__X-wBfa__exploreCards { flex-direction: column; align-items: center; gap: 46px; padding-top: 0px; }
.video-module__BiYiIq__figure.video-module__BiYiIq__oversize { width: var(--video-width); margin: var(--video-margin) 0 var(--video-margin) calc((768px - var(--video-width)) / 2); }
.text-module__fl7lUq__paragraph code, .text-module__fl7lUq__richTextTitle code { white-space: pre-wrap; word-break: break-word; }
.text-module__fl7lUq__table { border-radius: unset; border: unset; box-shadow: unset; }
.text-module__fl7lUq__table tbody { border-top: 1px solid var(--ds-gray-400); margin-block: -1px; margin-bottom: 10px; box-shadow: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.04) 0px 1px 2px; }
.text-module__fl7lUq__table.text-module__fl7lUq__superTable { border: unset; box-shadow: unset; overflow-x: auto; width: 100% !important; }
.text-module__fl7lUq__supertableContainer { border-radius: unset; border: unset; box-shadow: unset; overflow-x: unset; }
.footer-module__QGSwJW__primaryDescription { letter-spacing: -0.4px; text-align: center; max-width: 700px; font-size: 20px; line-height: 26px; }
.date-pill-module__ieVTja__date { background: var(--ds-background-100); box-shadow: var(--ds-shadow-border); border-radius: 99px; padding: 6px 12px; position: static; }
.navigation-menu-module__AENi4G__content { animation: auto ease 0s 1 normal none running none; }
.navigation-menu-module__AENi4G__viewport[data-state="open"] { animation: auto ease 0s 1 normal none running none; }
.navigation-menu-module__AENi4G__viewport[data-state="closed"] { animation: auto ease 0s 1 normal none running none; }

.navigation-menu-module__AENi4G__dropdown2026SlideDown, .navigation-menu-module__AENi4G__dropdown2026SlideUp, .navigation-menu-module__AENi4G__dropdown2026EnterFromLeft, .navigation-menu-module__AENi4G__dropdown2026EnterFromRight { animation: auto ease 0s 1 normal none running none; }
.v0-cursor-reveal-module__eaE5iq__cursor { animation: auto ease 0s 1 normal none running none; transform: translate(100%); }
.v0-cursor-reveal-module__eaE5iq__cursor::after { opacity: 0; animation: auto ease 0s 1 normal none running none; }

.v-0-mark-animated-module__vqP9MW__v, .v-0-mark-animated-module__vqP9MW__zeroBottom, .v-0-mark-animated-module__vqP9MW__zeroTop, .v-0-mark-animated-module__vqP9MW__zeroSlash { stroke-dasharray: 0; stroke-dashoffset: 1px; animation: auto ease 0s 1 normal none running none; }

dialog.geist-dialog { --translate-y-start: -40px; --translate-y-end: 0px; bottom: revert; top: revert; border-radius: var(--geist-marketing-radius); width: 420px; overflow: hidden auto; margin: revert !important; }
.geist-w { --translate-y-start: -40px; --translate-y-end: 0px; bottom: revert; top: revert; border-radius: 10px; width: 420px; overflow: hidden auto; margin: revert !important; }

.summary-module__twLPQq__turbo-summary-item-text { text-align: left; letter-spacing: -0.029375rem; max-width: 200px; font-size: 1.5rem; line-height: 2rem; }

.turbohero-module__73qp5G__counter-border i::before { animation: auto ease 0s 1 normal none running none; }

.point-module__2BBxbW__prefix { --size: 32px; left: unset; width: fit-content; position: relative; }

div.tabbed-code-block-module__GvcU7W__tabs { scrollbar-width: none; flex-direction: row; align-items: flex-start; margin-bottom: -1px; display: flex; overflow-x: scroll; }
div.tabbed-code-block-module__GvcU7W__tabs .tabbed-code-block-module__GvcU7W__tabList { scrollbar-width: none; flex-direction: row; align-items: flex-start; display: flex; }

button.tab-module__AKeiTG__tab span { align-items: center; display: flex; }

.report-module__W4CQZG__root .report-module__W4CQZG__content { text-align: center; justify-content: center; align-items: center; padding: 24px; }
